use_codes.desc: FOR USE IN THE TREATMENT OF MALIGNANT HYPERTHERMIA IN CONJUNCTION WITH APPROPRIATE SUPPORTIVE MEASURES AND FOR THE PREVENTION OF MALIGNANT HYPERTHERMIA IN PATIENTS AT HIGH RISK.
